series_metadata.series_description: Payment requests, applications and correspondence from parents, students and high school guidance counselors related to this program.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: correspondence from applicants and recipients and copies of checks from recipients and institutions in office . audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, . ; Electronic: all applicants, student names, Social Security Numbers and award amounts . audit by Auditor of State is completed and released
